name: mattpocock-skills
description: Selected skills for grilling plans, domain modeling, teaching, and writing better skills.

interface.shortDescription: Grill plans, model domains, and improve skill writing.
interface.longDescription: Adds writing-great-skills, grill-with-docs, grill-me, grilling, domain-modeling, and teach.
defaultPrompt: Use grill-me to stress-test this plan.
Use grill-with-docs to sharpen this design and record the domain model.
Use teach to teach me this concept over multiple sessions.
Use writing-great-skills to review this skill.
